service.name: RestCountries API
service.description_for_ai: Free country data API. 250 countries with name, capital, population, area, currency, languages, flag, borders, timezone, calling code. No API key needed. Use for country info, flags, geographic data.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get all info about a country: population, area, capital, currency, languages, flag emoji, borders.

name.description: Country name e.g. Germany, Russia, Japan

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get country by ISO alpha-2 or alpha-3 code.

code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (RU, DE, US) or alpha-3 (RUS, DEU, USA)

agent_hints.by_code: get_by_code is faster for known countries. get_country (by name) does fuzzy matching.
agent_hints.fields_filter: Add ?fields=name,capital,population to get only needed fields and reduce response size.
agent_hints.languages: Returns languages as object: {eng: 'English', fra: 'French'}. Key is 3-letter ISO 639-3 code.
agent_hints.cca2: cca2 = ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (RU, US). cca3 = alpha-3 (RUS, USA). ccn3 = numeric (643, 840).
